title: Billing Catalog to DB — complete SPEC-168 by making the addon catalog & residual plan/promo reads DB-backed, and document the code-level structural boundary

tasks.title: Add addon CRUD Zod schemas to @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Extend `packages/schemas/src/api/billing/addon.schema.ts` with CRUD schemas mirroring `billing-plan.schema.ts`: CreateAddonSchema, UpdateAddonSchema, AdminAddonListQuerySchema, AdminAddonResponseSchema. Include slug, name, billingType, priceArs (integer centavos), durationDays, affectsLimitKey, limitIncrease, grantsEntitlement, targetCategories, isActive, sortOrder. Tests: write unit tests in `packages/schemas/src/api/billing/__tests__/addon.schema.test.ts` covering valid input, invalid billingType enum, negative price, missing required fields. Files: 1 schema file + 1 test file.

subtasks.title: Add CreateAddonSchema with all required fields
Add UpdateAddonSchema (all fields optional for PATCH)
Add AdminAddonListQuerySchema with page+pageSize
Write schema unit tests (valid / invalid / boundary)

tasks.title: Build AddonCatalogService list() and getBySlug() methods (DB-backed)
tasks.description: Create `packages/service-core/src/services/billing/addon/addon-catalog.service.ts`. Implement `list(filter?)` reading from `billing_addons` with filters (billingType, targetCategory, active), sorted by `sortOrder` from metadata. Implement `getBySlug(slug)` querying `metadata.slug`. Both return `Result<T>`. Import table from `@repo/db`. Tests in `packages/service-core/src/services/billing/addon/__tests__/addon-catalog.service.test.ts`: list with no filter returns all active addons sorted; getBySlug returns correct addon; getBySlug with unknown slug returns NOT_FOUND. Files: 1 service file + 1 test file.

subtasks.title: Implement list() with billingType/targetCategory/active filters + sortOrder
Implement getBySlug() querying metadata.slug
Map billing_addons row to AddonDefinition shape
Write unit tests for list/getBySlug/NOT_FOUND/filter parity

tasks.title: Build AddonCatalogService row-to-AddonDefinition mapper with field-for-field parity test
tasks.description: In the same service file or a sibling `addon-catalog.mapper.ts`, implement the `mapRowToAddonDefinition(row)` function that unpacks `billing_addons` columns + `metadata` JSONB into the `AddonDefinition` shape (slug, name, description, billingType, priceArs, durationDays, affectsLimitKey, limitIncrease, grantsEntitlement, targetCategories, isActive, sortOrder). Write a parity test in `__tests__/addon-catalog.mapper.test.ts` asserting field-for-field equality against the static `ALL_ADDONS` config for every seeded addon slug. Files: 1 mapper file + 1 test file.

subtasks.title: Implement mapRowToAddonDefinition extracting columns + metadata JSONB fields
Handle optional fields gracefully (null vs undefined)

Public API signatures stay unchanged (behavior-preserving — downstream consumers untouched). tasks.title: Fix addon-entitlement.service.ts:160 bug (ALL_PLANS.find by UUID instead of slug) (FR-4)
tasks.description: HIGH PRIORITY BUG. In `apps/api/src/services/addon-entitlement.service.ts` line ~160: `ALL_PLANS.find(p => p.slug === activeSubscription.planId)` fails post-SPEC-168 because `planId` is now a UUID, not a slug — causing basePlanLimit to fall to 0. Fix: replace with `PlanService.getById(activeSubscription.planId)` (lookup by UUID, not slug). Write regression test in `apps/api/src/services/__tests__/addon-entitlement-plan-bug.test.ts` that reproduces the bug before the fix, then passes after. Files: 1 service file + 1 test file.

subtasks.title: Write failing regression test reproducing basePlanLimit=0 bug

Verify regression test now passes with correct basePlanLimit

tasks.title: Write boundary ADR (ADR-030) for billing catalog vs structural definitions (FR-6)
tasks.description: Create `docs/decisions/ADR-030-billing-catalog-vs-structural-definitions.md`. Content: (1) DB-backed catalog = plans, prices, addons, promo codes — editable at runtime, seeded from config; (2) code-level structural definitions = ENTITLEMENT_DEFINITIONS, LIMIT_METADATA, getDefaultEntitlements, getUnlimitedEntitlements — enum-coupled, must stay in code; (3) rationale: type-safety, drift avoidance, packaging constraints; (4) BETA-58 supersession (repo-root move rejected, packaging); (5) SPEC-168 lineage. Add entry to `docs/decisions/README.md`. Files: 1 ADR file + 1 README update.
